data.title: TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures data is securely transmitted between the user and the website.
data.technical_spec: Uses Transport Layer Security protocols to encrypt data in transit.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects web applications from HTTP/S threats like SQL injection and cross-site scripting.
data.technical_spec: Filters and monitors HTTP traffic between a web application and the Internet.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Protects against distributed denial-of-service attacks that attempt to make an online service unavailable.
data.technical_spec: Deploys various network infrastructure and techniques to handle volumetric attacks.

data.title: Two-factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security by requiring not only a password but also a second factor to log in.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes methods like SMS, authenticator apps, or hardware tokens.

data.title: Security Incident and Event Management (SIEM)
data.description: Provides real-time analysis of security alerts generated by applications and network hardware.
data.technical_spec: Aggregates data and employs advanced analytics to detect suspicious activity.
